text.title: RACI Matrix Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of RACI Matrix, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: RACI Matrix — clean application
example.note: raci-2026-orion-ops — 3 tasks across 5 stakeholders; weekly status R/A=pm, C=eng-lead, I=finance; review_due 2026-08-23 owner Iryna V.
